# S33D.life

> Living Atlas of Ancient Trees — a participatory, locally curated map of the world's ancient friends, gathering wisdom, stories, and ecological observations from wanderers around the planet.

S33D.life is a community-run library that combines an interactive global map of remarkable ancient trees ("Ancient Friends"), a stewardship economy of Hearts and offerings (memories, songs, art, prayer, blooms), and a botanical study room called the Arborium. Wanderers check in at trees, leave offerings and whispers, follow seasonal rhythms, and join a Council of Life that gathers around lunar phases.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Project introduction and entry into the living atlas.
- [The Map](/map): Interactive global map of ancient trees, groves, and bioregions.
- [World Atlas](/atlas): Country-by-country atlas of ancient trees.
- [Countries Index](/atlas/countries): All countries with mapped ancient friends.
- [Bio-regions Index](/atlas/bio-regions): Ecological regions and their living archives.
- [Heartwood Library](/library): Rooms of knowledge — Arborium, Ancient Friends, Quest Cave, Rhythms, and more.
- [The Arborium](/library/arborium): Botanical field guide — recognise, understand, and build relationship with trees.
- [Ancient Friends](/library/ancient-friends): The permanent archive of verified ancient trees.
- [Groves](/groves): Living groves formed by clusters of nearby trees.
- [Forest Pulse](/pulse): Real-time ecosystem activity across the atlas.
- [Pilgrimage Pathways](/pathways): Curated routes between ancient friends.
- [Species Hives](/hives): Botanical lineages and species councils.
- [Council of Life](/council-of-life): Bi-weekly gatherings at new and full moons.
- [Council Records](/council/records): Archive of past council sessions.
- [Living Archive](/living-archive): Cross-grove memory and story archive.
- [Discovery](/discovery): New offerings, whispers, and tree encounters.
- [Tree Ledger](/ledger): Public economy and provenance ledger.
- [Value Tree](/value-tree): How the stewardship economy works.
- [Golden Dream](/golden-dream): Long-horizon vision for the atlas.
- [Radio](/radio): Community audio offerings and ambient field recordings.
- [Welcome](/welcome): First steps for new wanderers.
- [Install](/install): Install S33D as a mobile/desktop app.

## Optional

- [Docs](/docs): Public documentation for stewards and contributors.
- [S33D Gateway](/s33d): Lore and origin of the S33D project.
